content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Two Buttons". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/520/B
content.inputFormat: The input consists of two integers, n and m, on a single line, separated by a space.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of presses required to get from n to m.

solution.approach: Use BFS to explore all possible states and find the minimum number of presses.
